text:
DESCRIPTION: This is the CCW-assigned pharmacy identification number used to uniquely identify pharmacy entities. 
The ID is specific to the CCW and not applicable to any other identification system or data source. 
This field also enables linkage between pharmacies in the Part D Event file and the CCW Pharmacy 
Characteristics file. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: CCW_PHARM_ID 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
PDE and NCDPD DataQ™ (derived) 
VALUES: 
Null/missing, or a 5-digit numeric value
